stackRuleEn: Counter power. Additional Artifact adds more debuff-negation charges.
stackRuleZh: 计数型状态。再次获得时会增加可抵消减益的层数。
resolutionRuleEn: Before a visible debuff is applied to the owner, Artifact changes that debuff amount to 0, then loses 1 stack.
resolutionRuleZh: 在可见减益施加给持有者前，Artifact 会把该减益量改为 0，然后自身减少 1 层。

stackRuleEn: Single-instance buff. Reapplying keeps the effect active instead of building a duration counter.
stackRuleZh: 单实例增益。再次获得时维持效果存在，而不是继续叠加持续层数。
resolutionRuleEn: While active, the owner's Block is not cleared between turns.
resolutionRuleZh: 效果存在时，持有者的格挡不会在回合切换时被清空。
descriptionEn: [gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of {ApplierName.StringValue:cond:[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]|your} turn.
descriptionZh: [gold]格挡[/gold]不会在{ApplierName.StringValue:cond:[gold]{OwnerName}的[/gold]|你的}回合开始时被移除。

stackRuleEn: Counter-duration buff. More Blur extends how many player turns Block is preserved.
stackRuleZh: 计时型增益。再次获得会延长保留格挡的玩家回合数。
resolutionRuleEn: Prevents the owner's Block from clearing, then ticks down by 1 at the start of the player side turn.
resolutionRuleZh: 阻止持有者的格挡被清空，并在玩家方回合开始时减少 1 层。
descriptionEn: [gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of your next {Amount:plural:turn|{} turns}.
descriptionZh: 你的下{Amount}个回合开始时[gold]格挡[/gold]不会消失。

stackRuleEn: Counter power. Additional Buffer adds more future damage-prevention charges.
stackRuleZh: 计数型状态。再次获得会增加未来可抵消伤害的次数。
resolutionRuleEn: If the owner would lose HP, that HP loss becomes 0 and Buffer loses 1 stack.
resolutionRuleZh: 如果持有者将失去生命值，则本次失血改为 0，并消耗 1 层 Buffer。
descriptionEn: Prevent the next {Amount:plural:time|[blue]{}[/blue] times} you would lose HP.
descriptionZh: 阻止下[blue]{Amount}[/blue]次你受到的生命值损伤。

stackRuleEn: Counter stat. Additional Dexterity changes the current value additively and can also push it negative.
stackRuleZh: 计数型属性。再次获得会按加法改变当前数值，也可能变成负值。
resolutionRuleEn: Adds its amount to powered card and monster-move Block gained by the owner.
resolutionRuleZh: 把自身数值加到持有者通过强化牌或敌方动作获得的格挡上。
descriptionZh: {Amount:cond:<0?减少|增加}从卡牌中获得的[gold]格挡[/gold]值[blue]{Amount:abs()}[/blue]点。

stackRuleEn: Counter stat. Focus stacks additively and can be positive or negative.
stackRuleZh: 计数型属性。Focus 按加法叠加，既可以是正值也可以是负值。
resolutionRuleEn: Modifies the owner's orb values by its amount, with final orb values clamped to at least 0.
resolutionRuleZh: 按自身数值修正持有者的充能球效果，但最终充能球数值不会低于 0。

stackRuleEn: Counter-duration debuff. More Frail extends remaining turns instead of changing the 25% modifier.
stackRuleZh: 计时型减益。再次获得会延长剩余回合，而不是改变 25% 的倍率。
resolutionRuleEn: Reduces powered Block gained by the owner to 75%, then ticks down at enemy turn end.
resolutionRuleZh: 把持有者获得的强化格挡降为 75%，并在敌方回合结束时递减。
descriptionZh: [blue]{Amount}[/blue]回合内，从卡牌中获得的[gold]格挡[/gold]值减少[blue]25%[/blue]。

stackRuleEn: Counter-duration buff. More Intangible extends the number of protected turns.
stackRuleZh: 计时型增益。再次获得会延长受到保护的回合数。
resolutionRuleEn: Caps incoming HP loss and damage to 1 by default, or 5 if the dealer has The Boot, then ticks down at enemy turn end.
resolutionRuleZh: 默认把受到的生命损失和伤害上限压到 1；若伤害来源持有 The Boot，则上限为 5。效果会在敌方回合结束时递减。
descriptionEn: Reduce all damage taken and HP loss to [blue]1[/blue]. Lasts for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}.
descriptionZh: 将受到的所有伤害和生命减少效果降低为[blue]1[/blue]。持续[blue]{Amount}[/blue]回合。

stackRuleEn: Single-instance debuff. Reapplying does not create a visible duration counter.
stackRuleZh: 单实例减益。再次施加不会形成可见的持续层数计数。
resolutionRuleEn: Blocks the owner's normal draws, still allows hand-triggered draws, and removes itself at turn end.
resolutionRuleZh: 阻止持有者的常规抽牌，但仍允许由手牌触发的抽牌，并会在回合结束时自我移除。
descriptionEn: You may not draw any more cards this turn.
descriptionZh: 你在本回合无法再抽更多牌。

stackRuleEn: Counter power. More Plating increases both its current block grant and remaining layers.
stackRuleZh: 计数型状态。再次获得会同时提高当前给予的格挡值和剩余层数。
resolutionRuleEn: Grants Block equal to its amount at the end of the owner's side turn. At enemy turn end, players lose 1 layer while enemies lose their stored decrement value.
resolutionRuleZh: 在持有者所在方回合结束时给予等同层数的格挡。在敌方回合结束时，玩家失去 1 层，而敌人会失去其记录的递减值。
descriptionEn: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Plating[/gold] is reduced by [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] at the start of your turn.
descriptionZh: 在你的回合结束时获得[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。[gold]覆甲[/gold]会在你的回合开始时减少[blue]{Decrement}[/blue]层。

stackRuleEn: Counter damage-over-time debuff. More Poison increases the next trigger's damage and future decay length.
stackRuleZh: 计数型持续伤害减益。再次获得会提高下一次触发伤害，并延长后续衰减长度。
resolutionRuleEn: At the start of the poisoned side's turn, deals unblockable unpowered damage equal to its amount, then decrements by 1 if the target survives.
resolutionRuleZh: 在中毒方回合开始时，造成等同层数的不可格挡、非强化伤害；若目标存活，则随后减少 1 层。
descriptionEn: At the start of {OnPlayer:your turn, lose|its turn, loses} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP, then reduce [gold]Poison[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
descriptionZh: 在{OnPlayer:你的回合|其回合}开始时失去[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点生命，然后将[gold]中毒[/gold]层数减少[blue]1[/blue]。

stackRuleEn: Counter heal-over-time buff. More Regen increases the next heal and extends total value over future turns.
stackRuleZh: 计数型持续回复增益。再次获得会提高下一次回复量，并增加未来可结算的总值。
resolutionRuleEn: At the end of the owner's side turn, heals for its amount, then decrements by 1.
resolutionRuleZh: 在持有者所在方回合结束时，按当前层数回复生命，然后减少 1 层。
descriptionEn: At the end of your turn, heal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP, then reduce [gold]Regen[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
descriptionZh: 在你的回合结束时回复[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点生命，然后将[gold]再生[/gold]减少[blue]1[/blue]。

stackRuleEn: Counter growth buff. More Ritual increases the Strength granted on each future trigger.
stackRuleZh: 计数型成长增益。再次获得会提高以后每次触发给予的力量值。
resolutionRuleEn: At the end of the owner's side turn, grants Strength equal to Ritual. Newly applied enemy Ritual skips the first immediate trigger once.
resolutionRuleZh: 在持有者所在方回合结束时，给予等同于 Ritual 的力量。刚施加到敌人的 Ritual 会跳过第一次立即结算。
descriptionZh: 在{OnPlayer:你的|其}回合结束时，获得[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。

stackRuleEn: Counter stat. Strength stacks additively and can also become negative.
stackRuleZh: 计数型属性。Strength 按加法叠加，也可能变成负值。
resolutionRuleEn: Adds its amount to the owner's powered attack damage.
resolutionRuleZh: 把自身数值加到持有者的强化攻击伤害上。
descriptionZh: {Amount:cond:<0?减少|增加}攻击牌造成的伤害值[blue]{Amount:abs()}[/blue]点。

stackRuleEn: Counter reactive buff. More Thorns increases each reflected hit's damage.
stackRuleZh: 计数型反击增益。再次获得会提高每次反伤的数值。
resolutionRuleEn: When the owner is hit by an attack, deals unpowered damage equal to Thorns back to the dealer.
resolutionRuleZh: 当持有者被攻击命中时，会向伤害来源反弹等同于 Thorns 的非强化伤害。
descriptionEn: When hit by an attack, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage back.
descriptionZh: 当被攻击命中时，反击造成[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点伤害。

stackRuleEn: Counter-duration debuff. More Vulnerable extends remaining turns instead of changing the base multiplier.
stackRuleZh: 计时型减益。再次获得会延长剩余回合，而不是改变基础倍率。
resolutionRuleEn: Powered attacks against the owner are multiplied by 1.5, then Vulnerable ticks down at enemy turn end.
resolutionRuleZh: 针对持有者的强化攻击会乘以 1.5，然后易伤会在敌方回合结束时递减。
descriptionEn: Receive [blue]{DamageIncrease:percentMore()}%[/blue] more damage from Attacks for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}.
descriptionZh: [blue]{Amount}[/blue]回合内，受到的攻击伤害增加[blue]{DamageIncrease:percentMore()}%[/blue]。

stackRuleEn: Counter-duration debuff. More Weak extends remaining turns instead of changing the base multiplier.
stackRuleZh: 计时型减益。再次获得会延长剩余回合，而不是改变基础倍率。
resolutionRuleEn: The owner's powered attacks are multiplied by 0.75, then Weak ticks down at enemy turn end.
resolutionRuleZh: 持有者打出的强化攻击会乘以 0.75，然后虚弱会在敌方回合结束时递减。
descriptionZh: [blue]{Amount}[/blue]回合内，造成的攻击伤害减少[blue]25%[/blue]。
